title: eriogonum collinum
intro: Eriogonum collinum, also known as Buckwheat Sage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum collinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Eriogonum collinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
